content:
This Month's Energy

Sagittarius, May 2026 begins in private and ends with a Full Moon in your own sign — a rare Blue Moon on May 31 that closes the month with a personal climax. The Scorpio Full Moon on May 3 lights your twelfth house of rest, closure, and behind-the-scenes work — a chapter ends; honor it. The Taurus New Moon on May 16 falls in your sixth house of daily work and wellbeing — your annual reset for routines. The Blue Moon on May 31 lands in your first house of identity and self — a personal truth arrives in the light. Abundance and expansion is the theme, and the abundance comes only after you rest, rebuild the routine, and let the Full Moon in your sign pull a deep truth into the open.

Key Dates for Sagittarius in May 2026

| Date | Transit | Meaning for Sagittarius | Do / Avoid | |------|---------|-------------------|------------| | May 3 | Full Moon in Scorpio (Flower Moon) | Rest, closure, behind-the-scenes — Do: sleep, journal, release / Avoid: launching anything public | | May 9 | Venus square Pluto | Power in love or friendship — Do: name the dynamic / Avoid: escape through adventure | | May 16 | New Moon in Taurus | Daily work and wellbeing reset — Do: commit to one sustainable new habit / Avoid: burnout-as-productivity | | May 20 | Sun enters Gemini | Partnership conversations — Do: revisit a contract or relationship / Avoid: vague arrangements | | May 25 | Mars enters Virgo | Career visibility and ambition — Do: take the public-facing meeting / Avoid: hiding behind the work | | May 31 | Blue Moon in Sagittarius (Micro) | Personal clarity climax — Do: write what you now know about yourself / Avoid: postponing the truth one more week |

Career & Money

Sagittarius, the first half of May is genuinely restful — the May 3 Scorpio Full Moon in your twelfth house says finish, close, sleep. Treat the rest as career work, not a break from it; the chapter that is ending needs to actually end before the next one begins. The bigger work story starts with the May 16 Taurus New Moon in your sixth house: your annual daily-routine reset. Commit to one sustainable habit that supports the year ahead — a sleep window, a focus block, a walking practice — and resist the Sagittarius trap of grand visions that never become daily systems. When Mars enters your tenth house of career on May 25, you enter a six-week window of unusual visibility and ambition; take the public-facing meeting, accept the speaking invite, pitch the bigger platform. The Sun in your partnership house from May 20 sharpens contract and collaboration conversations; revisit terms, scope, and deliverables with a partner or co-creator. The Blue Moon on May 31 in your sign gives you a personal clarity that shapes the entire next year — write down what you know on May 31 or June 1, because what you cannot name you cannot strategize toward. Pair the personal clarity with our crystals for wealth framework.

Love & Relationships

The Scorpio Full Moon on May 3 in your twelfth house makes the first week of May private, even solitary — old loves, secret feelings, or unresolved history may surface in dreams or quiet moments. Single Sagittarius may meet someone in a private, behind-the-scenes context — a dream, an old connection, a quiet encounter; partnered Sagittarius will need to align on a daily-routine or habit change that supports the relationship more than a dramatic conversation would. The Sun in your partnership house from May 20 opens honest one-on-one work; revisit a contract, a commitment, or a shared future that has been drifting. The Blue Moon on May 31 in your sign says: be honest about what you actually want before the year turns — the Sagittarius instinct is to keep all options open, and May rewards the choice made. The Venus-Pluto square on May 9 can surface a power dynamic in love or friendship that has been quietly shaping your choices; name it once, kindly, then act on the information. For support in softening restlessness in love, see our crystals for love collection.

Health & Wellness

The May 3 Scorpio Full Moon in your twelfth house makes early May one of your most important rest windows of the year — Sagittarius often pushes through fatigue with movement, adventure, or distraction; do not. Sleep, journal, dream, rest. Citrine is traditionally associated with sunlight, optimism, and steady will — often used as a mindfulness reminder when existential weight gets heavy (a Sagittarius specialty). After the May 16 New Moon in your sixth house, begin one new sustainable routine — a daily walk, a regular sleep window, a hydration practice — and let it run for the rest of the year. The May 3 Scorpio Full Moon in your twelfth house makes early May one of your most important rest windows of the year — Sagittarius often pushes through fatigue with movement, adventure, or distraction; do not. Sleep, journal, dream, rest, and treat the rest as career work. After the May 16 New Moon in your sixth house, begin one new sustainable routine — a daily walk, a regular sleep window, a hydration practice — and let it run for the rest of the year.

Crystal of the Month: Citrine

Why this crystal fits Sagittarius this month. Sagittarius, your ruling planet is Jupiter (expansion, meaning, hope); Citrine is its stone — sun-colored, sun-warm, sun-steady. With a restful Full Moon, a routine New Moon, and a personal Blue Moon all in one month, Citrine lines up with all three: it warms the rest, supports the routine, and brings the personal truth into the light. It is the stone that helps you be the meaning you have been chasing. How to use it during May. Place Citrine on your nightstand through the week of the May 3 Full Moon. Hold it on May 16 when you commit to the new routine. Carry it on May 31 when the Blue Moon in your sign brings the personal clarity. Best date to use it. May 31, the Blue Moon in your sign — with Citrine in hand, write the one-sentence answer to: What do I now know about myself that I have been avoiding? Read more. Deep dive in our full Citrine meaning guide and explore the complete Sagittarius crystals collection.

Monthly Crystal Ritual

Date: May 31, Blue Moon in Sagittarius (first house of self). 1. Cleanse your Citrine in morning sunlight for ten minutes. 2. Write the answer to one question: Who am I becoming, after the rest of early May and the routine rebuild of mid-May? Write three sentences. 3. Because the Taurus New Moon two weeks earlier was about daily routine, write a second line: One daily habit that supports this version of me is ___. 4. Place the Citrine on both line overnight on your nightstand. Each morning for a week, hold the stone for two minutes and reread the first three sentences aloud.

Shop

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Sagittarius crystal guide for stones traditionally connected with abundance, optimism, and personal truth — Citrine pairs beautifully with Lapis Lazuli for a Sagittarius truth-and-abundance kit.

FAQ

Is May 2026 a good month for Sagittarius? Yes — especially the final week. The Blue Moon in your sign on May 31 is your personal clarity climax of the spring. What does the May 31 Sagittarius Blue Moon mean for me? It activates your first house of identity. A personal truth you have been avoiding comes into the light. Write it down. How will the May 16 Taurus New Moon affect Sagittarius? It activates your sixth house of daily work and wellbeing. Commit to one new sustainable routine that supports the year ahead. What is the best crystal for Sagittarius in May 2026? Citrine. With a rest Full Moon, a routine New Moon, and a personal Blue Moon all in one month, sunlit clarity and steady will are the work — and Citrine is the traditional Jupiter-ruled ally for it. Sagittarius-only question: Should I make a big personal decision in late May 2026? Yes. The Blue Moon in your sign on May 31 is one of your clearest personal-decision windows of the year. Rest in early May, rebuild the routine in mid-May, decide in the final week.
